audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: MAX_TX_GAS_LIMIT_OSAKA (2^24) is hardcoded constant. Transaction validation at L161 checks tx.gas_limit() > MAX_TX_GAS_LIMIT_OSAKA independently of block.gas_limit(). Multiple enforcement points (pool validation eth.rs:490-498, consensus validation.rs:159-170, EVM cap evm.rs:170) all use same constant. No code path couples transaction cap to block gas limit.
